segments.text: In my distress I called to the Lord, and he answered me.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Deliver me, O Lord, from lying lips, from a deceitful tongue.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: What shall be given to you, and what more shall be done to you, you deceitful tongue?
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: What shall be given…: or, What shall the deceitful tongue give unto thee? or, what shall is profit thee?

segments.text: A warrior's sharp arrows, with burning coals of the broom tree.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: Sharp…: or, It is as the sharp arrows of the mighty man, with coals of juniper

segments.text: Woe to me, that I sojourn in Meshech, that I dwell among the tents of Kedar!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Too long have I had my dwelling among those who hate peace.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I am for peace, but when I speak, they are for war!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

footnotes: for peace: or, a man of peace
